name: artifacts-builder
tagline: Scaffolds, develops, and bundles a React/Tailwind/shadcn project into a single self-contained HTML claude.ai artifact.
verdict: Clean scope and packaging with a good negative trigger, but the core 'develop your artifact' step points readers to a 'Common Development Tasks' section that does not exist anywhere in the document, and the npm/Parcel bundling flow has no stated failure handling or explicit Node.js prerequisite. No version signal.

highlights.summary: Step 2 says 'See Common Development Tasks below for guidance' but no such section exists anywhere in the document, leaving the core step unguided.
Bundling/init steps depend on npm/Parcel tooling with no guidance on what to do if the scripts fail or index.html is missing.
Re-running init-artifact.sh against an existing project directory is unaddressed; only the bundling step is naturally idempotent.
